Then the leaks started — and Paxton made a ‘genius move’  CNNTrump is delaying Texas Senate endorsement to pressure GOP senators on SAVE America Act  PoliticoPaxton vs. Cornyn Is a Choice Between Two MAGA Flavors  The BulwarkTrump's endorsement in the Texas Senate race may hinge on passage of the SAVE America Act  NBC News
